message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

participant "User" as User
participant "pub.com" as PubCom
participant "prebid.js" as Prebid
participant "prebid_[SSP_MODULE].js" as PrebidSSP
participant "SSPs" as SSPs
participant "DSPs" as DSPs
participant "gam.js" as GamJS
participant "GAM/AdX" as GAMAdX

User -> PubCom : 1. navigates browser to pub.com
PubCom -> Prebid : 2. load, configure, execute prebid.js
Prebid -> PrebidSSP : 3. invoke SSP bid adapter
PrebidSSP -> SSPs : 4. ad request
SSPs -> SSPs : 5. traffic quality controls
SSPs -> DSPs : 6. make bid requests
DSPs -> SSPs : 7. respond with bids
SSPs -> SSPs : 8. pub ad controls
SSPs -> PrebidSSP : 9. ad w/price
PrebidSSP -> Prebid : 10. ad w/price
Prebid -> Prebid : 11. select appropriate ad
Prebid -> GamJS : 12. configure k/v pair for selected ad
User <- PubCom : 13. wait for ad slot to load

hnote across #FFFFCC : At this point control over the ad loading process is transferred from Prebid.js to GAM (final selection layer)

PubCom -> GamJS : 14. load slot
GamJS -> GAMAdX : 15. ad request
GAMAdX -> GamJS : 16. respond with winning ad, which may be prebid.js line item

alt GAM/AdX highest bid
    GAMAdX -> GamJS : 17.1 render GAM/AdX result
else Prebid.js highest bid
    GamJS -> PrebidSSP : 17.2 render selected SSP ad
end

PubCom -> User : 18. show highest value advertisement

@enduml
```
